allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Luna Jewelry - Minimalist Gold Headless Shopify Store

- Remix + Vite + Tailwind CSS setup
- Minimalist gold jewelry aesthetic \(no stones, no pearls\)
- Homepage with hero, featured products, about section
- Collection pages with filtering
- Product detail pages
- Cart functionality
- Connected to Shopify Storefront API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Luna Jewelry - Minimalist Gold Headless Shopify Store

- Remix + Vite + Tailwind CSS setup
- Minimalist gold jewelry aesthetic \(no stones, no pearls\)
- Homepage with hero, featured products, about section
- Collection pages with filtering
- Product detail pages
- Cart functionality
- Connected to Shopify Storefront API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
